title: nephrodium funestum
intro: Nephrodium funestum, also known as the Black Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium funestum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the dried fronds in capsule or tincture form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
